// Generated by FrontComposer source generator
// Do not edit directly

#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable ASP0006 // seq++ pattern inside BuildRenderTree

using System;
using System.Globalization;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Fluxor;
using Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Communication;
using Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Lifecycle;
using Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Forms;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Rendering;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Localization;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components;
using Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Lifecycle;

namespace Counter.Domain;

/// <summary>
/// Auto-generated command form for <see cref="IncrementCommand"/>.
/// </summary>
public partial class IncrementCommandForm : ComponentBase, IDisposable
{
    [Parameter] public Counter.Domain.IncrementCommand? InitialValue { get; set; }

    /// <summary>Story 2-2 ADR-016: when true, derivable fields are not rendered (renderer pre-fills them).</summary>
    [Parameter] public bool DerivableFieldsHidden { get; set; }

    /// <summary>Story 2-2 ADR-016: when non-null, only fields whose property name is in the set are rendered.</summary>
    [Parameter] public string[]? ShowFieldsOnly { get; set; }

    /// <summary>Story 2-2 ADR-016: invoked after the form dispatches ConfirmedAction so the renderer can close popovers / navigate.</summary>
    [Parameter] public EventCallback OnConfirmed { get; set; }

    /// <summary>Story 2-2 ADR-016 / Decision D36: renderer registers this callback on first render so the 0-field Inline button can synthesize a submit.</summary>
    [Parameter] public Action<Action>? RegisterExternalSubmit { get; set; }

    /// <summary>Story 2-2 ADR-016: renderer hook invoked immediately before dispatch so derivable values can be refreshed per submit.</summary>
    [Parameter] public Func<Task>? BeforeSubmit { get; set; }

    [Inject] private IState<IncrementCommandLifecycleState> LifecycleState { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private IDispatcher Dispatcher { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private ILastUsedSubscriberRegistry LastUsedSubscriberRegistry { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Lifecycle.ILifecycleBridgeRegistry LifecycleBridgeRegistry { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private ICommandService CommandService { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private IStringLocalizer<Counter.Domain.IncrementCommand> Localizer { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private ILogger<IncrementCommandForm>? Logger { get; set; }

    private Counter.Domain.IncrementCommand _model = new();
    private EditContext? _editContext;
    private CancellationTokenSource? _cts;
    private bool _disposed;
    private bool _externalSubmitRegistered;
    private string? _submittedCorrelationId;
    /// <summary>Indicates the form has been modified since creation. Used by later stories to warn on navigation.</summary>
    public bool IsDirty { get; private set; }

    private string? _AmountString;
    private string? _AmountParseError;

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        _model = InitialValue ?? new();
        _editContext = new EditContext(_model);
        _editContext.OnFieldChanged += OnEditContextFieldChanged;
        LifecycleState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
    }

    private void OnEditContextFieldChanged(object? sender, FieldChangedEventArgs e) { IsDirty = true; }

    private CommandLifecycleState _previousLifecycleState = CommandLifecycleState.Idle;
    private void OnStateChanged(object? sender, EventArgs e) {
        // Story 2-2 ADR-016: surface Confirmed transition to the renderer via OnConfirmed callback.
        // Guard by correlation id so sibling forms of the same command type do not react to
        // another instance's successful submit.
        var current = LifecycleState.Value.State;
        var currentCorrelationId = LifecycleState.Value.CorrelationId;
        if (current == CommandLifecycleState.Confirmed
            && _previousLifecycleState != CommandLifecycleState.Confirmed
            && OnConfirmed.HasDelegate
            && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(_submittedCorrelationId)
            && string.Equals(currentCorrelationId, _submittedCorrelationId, StringComparison.Ordinal)) {
            _ = OnConfirmed.InvokeAsync(null);
        }
        _previousLifecycleState = current;
        InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override void OnAfterRender(bool firstRender) {
        if (firstRender && !_externalSubmitRegistered && RegisterExternalSubmit is not null) {
            _externalSubmitRegistered = true;
            // Story 2-2 ADR-016 rule 6 + Decision D36 — supply the renderer with a synthetic-submit invoker.
            RegisterExternalSubmit(() => _ = OnValidSubmitAsync());
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Resolves a field label following the AC3 precedence: an explicit
    /// <c>[Display(Name)]</c> wins, otherwise the runtime <see cref="IStringLocalizer"/>
    /// is consulted, and finally the humanized compile-time label is used as a fallback.
    /// Patch 2026-04-16 P-09 (precedence) + P-04 (narrow catch).
    /// </summary>
    private string ResolveLabel(string propertyName, string staticLabel, bool hasExplicitDisplay)
    {
        if (hasExplicitDisplay)
        {
            return staticLabel;
        }

        try
        {
            var localized = Localizer[propertyName];
            if (!localized.ResourceNotFound && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(localized.Value))
            {
                return localized.Value;
            }
        }
        catch (Exception ex) when (ex is not OperationCanceledException)
        {
            // Localizer misconfiguration (missing resource manager, culture load failure) is non-fatal.
        }

        return staticLabel;
    }

    private static bool IsDerivableField(string propertyName) => propertyName switch
    {
        "MessageId" or "CommandId" or "CorrelationId" or "TenantId" or "UserId" or "Timestamp" or "CreatedAt" or "ModifiedAt" => true,
        _ => false,
    };

    private bool HasClientParseErrors()
    {
        return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(_AmountParseError);
    }

    private async Task OnValidSubmitAsync()
    {
        // Story 2-2 code-review P35 — guard against invocation via RegisterExternalSubmit after form disposal.
        if (_disposed) return;
        // State-guard against rapid double-click: only allow submit from terminal or idle state.
        // (See code-review 2026-04-15, patch P19.)
        var currentState = LifecycleState.Value.State;
        if (currentState != CommandLifecycleState.Idle
            && currentState != CommandLifecycleState.Rejected
            && currentState != CommandLifecycleState.Confirmed)
        {
            return;
        }

        if (HasClientParseErrors())
        {
            _editContext?.NotifyValidationStateChanged();
            return;
        }

        // Story 2-2 code-review P36 — allocate new CTS BEFORE awaiting BeforeSubmit so disposal can cancel it.
        CancellationTokenSource? previous = _cts;
        _cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
        if (previous is not null)
        {
            try { previous.Cancel(); } catch (ObjectDisposedException) { }
            previous.Dispose();
        }

        if (BeforeSubmit is not null)
        {
            await BeforeSubmit().ConfigureAwait(false);
            if (_disposed || _cts.IsCancellationRequested) return;
        }

        var correlationId = Guid.NewGuid().ToString();
        _submittedCorrelationId = correlationId;
        var cts = _cts;

        // Story 2-3 D5 — lazily activate the lifecycle bridge so ILifecycleStateService receives
        // the typed Fluxor actions. Idempotent + per-circuit; mirrors Story 2-2 D35.
        LifecycleBridgeRegistry.Ensure<IncrementCommandLifecycleBridge>();
        // Story 2-2 D35 — lazily activate the generated subscriber before the first SubmittedAction dispatch.
        LastUsedSubscriberRegistry.Ensure<IncrementCommandLastUsedSubscriber>();

        Dispatcher.Dispatch(new IncrementCommandActions.SubmittedAction(correlationId, _model));
        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
        Logger?.LogInformation("Command submitted. CorrelationId={CorrelationId}", correlationId);

        try
        {
            var result = await CommandService.DispatchAsync(
                _model,
                onLifecycleChange: (state, _) =>
                {
                    // Guard against callbacks arriving after form disposal or cancellation (patch P10).
                    if (_disposed || cts.IsCancellationRequested) return;
                    switch (state)
                    {
                        case CommandLifecycleState.Syncing:
                            Dispatcher.Dispatch(new IncrementCommandActions.SyncingAction(correlationId));
                            break;
                        case CommandLifecycleState.Confirmed:
                            Dispatcher.Dispatch(new IncrementCommandActions.ConfirmedAction(correlationId));
                            break;
                    }
                },
                cancellationToken: cts.Token);

            Dispatcher.Dispatch(new IncrementCommandActions.AcknowledgedAction(correlationId, result.MessageId));
            Logger?.LogInformation("Command acknowledged. CorrelationId={CorrelationId} MessageId={MessageId}", correlationId, result.MessageId);
        }
        catch (CommandRejectedException ex)
        {
            Dispatcher.Dispatch(new IncrementCommandActions.RejectedAction(correlationId, ex.Message, ex.Resolution));
            // Notify validation pipeline so any stale error state redraws (patch P16).
            _editContext?.NotifyValidationStateChanged();
            Logger?.LogWarning("Command rejected. CorrelationId={CorrelationId} Reason={Reason}", correlationId, ex.Message);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException)
        {
            // Form disposed during submission; the Dispose path already handles state cleanup.
            if (!_disposed)
            {
                // Submit was cancelled without disposal -- reset lifecycle so the user can retry (patch P11).
                // Patch 2026-04-16 P-11: carry the submit correlation so sibling forms ignore this reset.
                Dispatcher.Dispatch(new IncrementCommandActions.ResetToIdleAction(correlationId));
            }
        }
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void Dispose()
    {
        // Idempotent dispose (patch P18). Blazor can invoke Dispose more than once on teardown.
        if (_disposed) return;
        _disposed = true;
        try { _cts?.Cancel(); } catch (ObjectDisposedException) { }
        _cts?.Dispose();
        _cts = null;
        if (_editContext is not null)
        {
            _editContext.OnFieldChanged -= OnEditContextFieldChanged;
        }
        LifecycleState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override void BuildRenderTree(RenderTreeBuilder builder)
    {
        int seq = 0;
        builder.OpenElement(seq++, "div");
        // AC3 density: Comfortable by default (patch P13).
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "class", "fc-command-form fc-density-comfortable");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "aria-label", "Send IncrementCommand command form");

        builder.OpenComponent<FcLifecycleWrapper>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "CorrelationId", _submittedCorrelationId);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)(__wrap =>
        {
            int wseq = 0;
            __wrap.OpenComponent<EditForm>(wseq++);
            __wrap.AddAttribute(wseq++, "EditContext", _editContext);
            __wrap.AddAttribute(wseq++, "OnValidSubmit", EventCallback.Factory.Create<EditContext>(this, _ => OnValidSubmitAsync()));
        RenderFragment<EditContext> formBody = _ => (RenderFragment)(__b =>
        {
            int cseq = 0;
            __b.OpenComponent<DataAnnotationsValidator>(cseq++);
            __b.CloseComponent();

            __b.OpenComponent<FluentValidationSummary>(cseq++);
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "Model", (object)_model);
            __b.CloseComponent();

            // Field: Amount
            if ((!DerivableFieldsHidden || !IsDerivableField("Amount"))
                && (ShowFieldsOnly is null || System.Array.IndexOf(ShowFieldsOnly, "Amount") >= 0))
            {
            __b.OpenComponent<FluentTextInput>(cseq++);
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "Value", _AmountString ?? _model.Amount.ToString(CultureInfo.CurrentCulture));
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "ValueChanged", EventCallback.Factory.Create<string?>(this, v => OnAmountChanged(v)));
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "Label", ResolveLabel("Amount", "Amount", false));
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "Required", true);
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "TextInputType", TextInputType.Number);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(_AmountParseError))
            {
                __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "Message", _AmountParseError);
                __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "MessageState", MessageState.Error);
            }
            __b.CloseComponent();
            }

            // Field: Note
            if ((!DerivableFieldsHidden || !IsDerivableField("Note"))
                && (ShowFieldsOnly is null || System.Array.IndexOf(ShowFieldsOnly, "Note") >= 0))
            {
            __b.OpenComponent<FluentTextInput>(cseq++);
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "Value", _model.Note);
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "ValueChanged", EventCallback.Factory.Create<string?>(this, v => _model.Note = v));
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "Label", ResolveLabel("Note", "Note", false));
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "Required", false);
            __b.CloseComponent();
            }

            __b.OpenComponent<FluentButton>(cseq++);
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "Type", ButtonType.Submit);
            // Enable submit in Idle, Confirmed, or Rejected (terminals allow retry) -- patch P3.
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "Disabled",
                LifecycleState.Value.State != CommandLifecycleState.Idle
                && LifecycleState.Value.State != CommandLifecycleState.Confirmed
                && LifecycleState.Value.State != CommandLifecycleState.Rejected);
            __b.AddAttribute(cseq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)(__btn =>
            {
                int bseq = 0;
                if (LifecycleState.Value.State == CommandLifecycleState.Submitting)
                {
                    __btn.OpenComponent<FluentSpinner>(bseq++);
                    __btn.AddAttribute(bseq++, "Style", "width: 20px; height: 20px; margin-right: 8px;");
                    __btn.CloseComponent();
                }
                __btn.AddContent(bseq++, "Send IncrementCommand");
            }));
            __b.CloseComponent();
        });
            __wrap.AddAttribute(wseq++, "ChildContent", formBody);
            __wrap.CloseComponent();
        }));
        builder.CloseComponent();
        builder.CloseElement();
    }


    private void OnAmountChanged(string? value)
    {
        _AmountString = value;
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
        {
            _AmountParseError = "A number is required.";
            return;
        }
        if (int.TryParse(value, NumberStyles.Integer | NumberStyles.AllowLeadingSign | NumberStyles.AllowTrailingWhite | NumberStyles.AllowLeadingWhite, CultureInfo.CurrentCulture, out var parsed))
        {
            _model.Amount = parsed;
            _AmountParseError = null;
        }
        else
        {
            _AmountParseError = "Invalid number format.";
        }
    }
}

#pragma warning restore ASP0006
